name_en: Milk White《Small Size》OHANEL🚩🚩🚩 26C Latest Woven Flap Bag, Handwoven Bag, Handwoven Bag Shopping Bag 🥂 The raffia and rattan weaving elements are indispensable in a vacation vibe. Made with imported natural wheat straw, it's surprising to see so many bright-colored suede handbags in the summer vacation series... Perfect for a wonderful summer night dinner or party, the bag is sure to be adorned with jewelry. The favorite is of course the collector series ice cream cup~Size: 23cm
